More than 300 success stories Success story How Collibra added three new automation features to their Data Intelligence Platform through a Gen AI Hackathon Success story From generative AI to your screen: Bouygues Telecom, AWS and Devoteam are building the TV services of tomorrow Success story Coca-Cola HBC gains visibility into its entire project universe Success story SEDE Veolia achieves unprecedented efficiency with AWS cloud and IOT Success story Randstad Group Belgium Becomes Data-Driven with Google Cloud Analytics and Data Warehouse Success story Société Générale Takes on the Challenge of Cloud Transformation Success story Strawberry’s Knowledge Revolution with the Scout AI Chatbot How Collibra added three new automation features to their Data Intelligence Platform through a Gen AI Hackathon From generative AI to your screen: Bouygues Telecom, AWS and Devoteam are building the TV services of tomorrow Coca-Cola HBC gains visibility into its entire project universe SEDE Veolia achieves unprecedented efficiency with AWS cloud and IOT Randstad Group Belgium Becomes Data-Driven with Google Cloud Analytics and Data Warehouse Société Générale Takes on the Challenge of Cloud Transformation Strawberry’s Knowledge Revolution with the Scout AI Chatbot Acting as tech architects, Devoteam guides AI-driven transformations Born in the early days of the tech revolution, Devoteam has been a trusted guide through the rise of the internet, the cloud, and now, the exciting potential of AI. But for us, tech is just a tool. Our real passion is empowering people. With over11,000 tech natives in 25+ countries across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa, you can count on our capacity to manage large-scale, ambitious projects. Yet, we remain agile enough to deliver customised solutions. Our unique partnerships with platforms like AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft and ServiceNow translate into award-winning market recognition and our customers’ trust. ### Acting as tech architects,   
Devoteam guides AI-driven transformations
Born in the early days of the tech revolution, Devoteam has been a **trusted guide** through the rise of the internet, the cloud, and now, the exciting potential of AI.
But for us, tech is just a tool. Our real passion is empowering people. With over**11,000 tech natives in 25+ countries** across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa, you can count on our capacity to manage large-scale, ambitious projects. Yet, we remain agile enough to deliver customised solutions.
Our unique partnerships with platforms like **AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft and ServiceNow** translate into award-winning market recognition and our customers’ trust.
